scripts.check:browser-test: tsc -p tsconfig.browser-test.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.browser-test.node.json --noEmit && node scripts/check-browser-test-isolation.cjs
scripts.test:regressions: node scripts/test-bootstrap-health.cjs && node scripts/test-download-restore-merge.cjs && node scripts/test-redownload-sequencing.cjs && node scripts/test-config-save-sequencing.cjs && node scripts/test-instance-lifecycle-coordinator.cjs && node scripts/test-vector-model-policy.cjs && node scripts/test-parameter-intent.cjs && node scripts/test-config-parameter-review.cjs && node scripts/test-parameter-catalog.cjs && node scripts/test-vector-performance.cjs && node scripts/test-live-throughput.cjs && node scripts/test-speculative-decoding.cjs && node scripts/test-engine-capabilities.cjs && node scripts/test-llama-parameter-alignment.cjs && node scripts/test-audit-remediations.cjs && node scripts/test-release-tag-version.cjs && npm run test:cross-platform
scripts.check:release: npm run check:encoding && npm run check:guide && npm run check:cluster-theme && npm run check:download-theme && npm run check:monitoring-theme && npm run check:react-hooks && npm run check:component-i18n && npm run check:component-budgets && npm run check:ipc-boundary && npm run check:rustsec-policy && npm run check:cross-platform-release && npm run check:browser-test && npm run test:browser && npm run test:regressions && tsc --noEmit
